note: Medicare rebate amounts are approximate and may change. Check Services Australia for current rates.
reviewNotes: Psychologist rebates verified 2026-06-10 against MBS items 80110 ($98.95) and 80010 ($145.25); fee $116.40 / $204.85, benefit 85%, current from 1 Jul 2025.

Psychiatrist rebates verified 2026-06-13: initial = MBS item 291 (referred assessment, 45+ min) $262.10 from 1 Jul 2025 (was $254.95 pre-indexation). Follow-up = item 302 (15-30 min) $87.05 (fee $102.40, benefit 85%, 1 Jul 2025); longer follow-ups (items 304/306) rebate up to ~$134. Calculator uses the conservative 15-30 min follow-up rebate so estimates don't understate costs.
Next indexation expected 1 Jul 2026 — re-check figures after that date.
